title: Horizontal Backport
description: Minecraft Forge 1.7.10 backport of "Horizontal Glass Panes".
body:
![Horizontal Backport](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cb8a77cfee326f5f65ed256c9961c0f14f49600.png)
![All blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0a704511d7619cd619748dff8b527f8ddd4f29c.png)

# Minecraft Forge 1.7.10 mod

![Differences](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce414c4ff2a1565f09263827d4717b6d075eaac4.png)

[EN]  
The mod backports the following functions by scratching and rewriting "[Horizontal Glass Panes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horizontal-glass-panes)".  
(If you are using the latest version Minecraft, their mod is all you need.)

- Block transparency
- Horizontal iron bars
- Same blast resistance and hardness as vanilla

[JP]  
「[Horizontal Glass Panes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/horizontal-glass-panes)」を新しく書き直したことにより、下記の機能をバックポートしたmodです。  
(最新版のマインクラフトを使っている場合、前述のMODがあれば十分です。)

- 透過ブロック
- 鉄格子
- バニラと同じ爆発耐性・硬度

# Compatibility

Block ID **COMPATIBLE**!

**JUST REPLACE or FRESH INSTALL** the mod jar file.

(No need for the old jar)

# Requires

- Minecraft 1.7.10
- Forge 10.13.4.1614
